message:
fix(assign,swarm): nil safety and channel lifecycle improvements

internal/assign/effectiveness.go:
- Add nil check for eff return value in GetEffectivenessBonus
- Properly acquire RLock before reading config fields to prevent race
- Extract config values to local vars before using outside lock scope

internal/swarm/limit_detector.go:
- Recreate event channel in Start() if it was previously closed by Stop()
- Close event channel in Stop() to properly unblock readers
- Set eventChan to nil after close to allow reinitialization

These fixes address potential nil pointer dereferences and channel lifecycle
issues that could cause panics or goroutine leaks in production.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
